base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_whip_subweapon_ducking — a character from 1986 castlevania. crouched pose with arm extensions. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame whip/subweapon-use cycle while ducking — crouched pose with arm extensions; used to hit low enemies like Fleamen
